Name: ASSET_TRANSCRIPTION_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the Super-LOD behavior for assets.

Fields.Name: SLOD Conversion Settings
Fields.Description: Settings used in SLOD conversion, used to turn on/off model display during transcription.

Fields.Name: Bake Asset LOD Level
Fields.Description: LOD level of the destination model

Fields.Name: Is Hemi-spherical Display
Fields.Description: Is it hemispherical display? (Only affected by LockCamBillboard)

Fields.Name: Bake Asset ID
Fields.Description: If the SLOD transfer destination model-1 is the same ID as the original model

Fields.Name: Lock-cam Billboard: Texture Resolution
Fields.Description: This is the resolution for unidirectional display, and the overall texture size is this resolution x number of images.

Fields.Name: Lock-cam Billboard: Texture Padding
Fields.Description: Is there padding applied to the texture?

Fields.Name: Cross Billboard: Texture Resolution
Fields.Description: This is the resolution for unidirectional display, and the overall texture size is this resolution x number of images.

Fields.Name: Cross Billboard: Texture Padding
Fields.Description: Is there padding applied to the texture?
